source_notes: Adult ISA allowance £20,000 across Cash / Stocks & Shares / LISA / IFISA.
LISA max £4,000 of that £20,000; government bonus is 25% (up to £1,000), not 20%.
Junior ISA £9,000 is separate from the adult £20,000 allowance.
Pension annual allowance simplified at £60,000 (taper / MPAA not modelled yet).

adult_isa.label: Adult ISA
adult_isa.notes: Combined subscriptions across cash, S&S, LISA and IFISA.

lisa.label: Lifetime ISA
lisa.notes: 25% government bonus on contributions; counts inside the £20k ISA limit.

junior_isa.label: Junior ISA
junior_isa.notes: Per child; separate from adult ISA allowance.

pension_annual.label: Pension annual allowance
pension_annual.notes: Simplified headline limit. Taper and money-purchase annual allowance not applied.
